query: SELECT supplierName, COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN connectionId IS NOT NULL AND connectionId != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_vbu FROM services GROUP BY supplierName ORDER BY has_vbu DESC LIMIT 20;
